title: One Month Exersizing Vlog and Flexing Video 6-19-2011

transcript.text: Hello, this is V-Log Flexing.
One month in, it's the 19th of June.
When I did this last, it was the 19th of May.
Time really goes by quick, my God.
I don't feel like it's been that much time, it's freaking me out.
I really only lifted weights maybe like four days in the last month
Because I've been basically under time constraints.
I guess I've been spending a lot of time doing other stuff.
I was working on those like rowing charts and then videos.
I don't know what the hell happened at the time.
But I've been in the gym like every day walking maybe between five to 13 and a half miles.
Average of 10, 7 to 10 miles or something.
I forgot to weigh myself today.
Fruits.
I guess this video isn't complete then.
I was 194.5 before with 24.5% fat.
I think I'm less now.
So, I guess I'll do a flex video.
The one month in flex video.
I think I'm definitely better off than I was a month ago.
I'll be better in a month.
You know, you just have to be patient.
So, there's me.
My belly is a little bit better.
A little bit better.
So, that's that.
I'm at my special place.
Just came back from the gym because they closed at 8 o'clock on Sunday and it's still light out.
Alright, see you in a month.
